votes.reason: The Python implementation correctly implements the Coq specification by comparing the input integer with the length of the string.
The Python code correctly checks if the given result equals the length of the string, matching the Coq specification.

The Python function strlen_spec returns True iff result equals len(s), which directly corresponds to the Coq specification that result = String.length s. Both compute string length and compare it to the given result, producing the same concrete judgment for all inputs.
